ksa_text: Ability to assess, manage, and monitor compliance-related risks throughout the AI system lifecycle, including risk identification, mitigation, and governance.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Included: ability maps directly to AI Provider Compliance Lead scope — regulatory/compliance signals detected ("compl  :y|ies|ying|iant|iance|iances)"). Seniority is appropriate for IC-lead-to-manager band: the KSA describes regulatory interpretation, compliance program work, or governance oversight.
